About Us

The team your neighbours trust

8+
Years serving
Jorhat

Jorhat City Service started with one promise — show up on time, fix it right the first time, and never surprise you with the bill. Today our certified technicians handle AC, fridge and washing machine repairs across Jorhat, Golaghat and Titabar, same-day, every day.

Every visit comes with upfront pricing, a service warranty and a technician who explains exactly what went wrong before touching a single screw.

🏅

AC Repair

No cooling, water leakage, strange noise, PCB faults — diagnosed & fixed on the spot. All brands.

AC Gas Filling

💧

AC Jet Wash

High-pressure water jet cleaning — removes dust, mould & debris from coils and filters. Restores airflow.

🔧

AC Installation

Clean, safe split & window AC installation — proper copper piping, brackets and drainage setup.

From ₹999
🫧

Washing Machine Repair

From ₹299
